label: Greek / Vol Surface
description: Crypto Greek surface visualisation; TradFi shows a skew-aware volatility grid per expiry and strike.

l0.notes: 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=["options-trading"]. 0.3: availableOn=["options"]. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; delegates to GreeksSurfacePanel / TradFiVolSurfacePanel which import from mocks internally — panel-level mock usage logged as L1 open finding. 0.6: N/A — options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock, never in a loading state. 0.7: Both GreeksSurfacePanel and TradFiVolSurfacePanel are Collapsible components — collapsed by default, always render a trigger button even if surface data were empty; asset/tradFiAsset always have values from context. 0.8: N/A — context throws if Provider missing (covered by WidgetErrorBoundary); no async error path. 0.9: No dead code, no commented-out blocks.

l1.notes: 1.1: Widget reads isCrypto, asset, tradFiAsset exclusively via useOptionsData() — no inline fetch or import. 1.2: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130) and reads globalScope.organizationIds to build scopedWatchlists. 1.3: Org filter gates watchlist scope — organizationIds without 'odum' org restricts to crypto-only watchlists; asset selection propagates accordingly. 1.4: clientIds not wired into options-data-context filtering — options context is asset/expiry-scoped not client-scoped; N/A for this widget. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable to greek surface display — shows surface for current asset, no strategy filtering needed. 1.6: Empty organizationIds → scopedWatchlists returns all DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (line 275 condition: organizationIds.length > 0 to restrict). 1.7: Mock constants (SPOT_PRICES, generateVolSurface) live in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock. Panel sub-components (vol-greeks-panels.tsx, tradfi-vol-surface-panel.tsx) import directly from mocks — should be injected via context in future; open finding, out of scope for widget cert.

knownIssues: Panel sub-components (vol-greeks-panels.tsx, tradfi-vol-surface-panel.tsx) import spot prices and surface generators directly from lib/mocks/fixtures — data should flow via options-data-context in a future refactor.

findings.description: 1.7 — vol-greeks-panels.tsx and tradfi-vol-surface-panel.tsx import generateVolSurface, SPOT_PRICES, ivToColor etc. directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock instead of receiving them via context props. Widget file itself is clean; this is a panel sub-component issue. Open for future context-injection work.
